name: CO_ASSIGNEE_TOP_TARGETPAIRS
description: List target pairs with the highest co-assigned patent counts.
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a1:Assignee)
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a2:Assignee)
WHERE a1.name < a2.name
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]->(tp:TargetPair)
RETURN tp.name AS target_pair, count(DISTINCT p) AS co_patent_count
ORDER BY co_patent_count DESC, target_pair
LIMIT 50;

examples: Which target pairs have the most co-assigned patents?
